plugins.name: cc-proxy
plugins.description: Z.ai and OpenRouter proxy for Claude Code — stateless local router with manual /model switching and per-provider auth.

plugins.name: okf
plugins.description: OKF knowledge-bundle skill and lifecycle commands.

plugins.name: cc-repete
plugins.description: Self-evolving autonomous loops for Claude Code — a Stop-hook loop engine that drives an agent toward a verifiable goal with an evolving payload, checkpoint gating, and a context budget.

plugins.name: cc-reload
plugins.description: Session continuity across context resets for Claude Code. Snapshots a session digest before /clear, /compact, or auto-compaction and auto-rehydrates it after. The non-looped companion to cc-repete — stands down whenever a cc-repete loop is active.

plugins.name: cc-status
plugins.description: A statusline framework for Claude Code that discovers per-plugin segment manifests, runs enabled ones, and joins them onto one bar — each plugin still works standalone.

plugins.name: cc-agents
plugins.description: GLM-offload review agents for Claude Code — auto-convenes a multi-lens panel of parallel GLM reviewers on spec and plan writes and synthesizes the findings into one scored report. Requires the cc-proxy plugin to run.

plugins.name: cc-unknowns
plugins.description: Single-skill harness for surfacing unknowns before, during, and after implementation — classifies each task across known/unknown quadrants so a strong model doesn't confidently execute the wrong thing.
